title: inbox.rs handle_delete orphan cleanup scans full table
description: inbox.rs line 1233: after deleting a remote post, the code runs 'DELETE FROM mentions WHERE remote_post_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM remote_posts)'. This is a full table scan of mentions correlated against all remote_posts — O(mentions * remote_posts). Since we just deleted one specific post and know its post_id, the fix is: 'DELETE FROM mentions WHERE remote_post_id = ?' bound to the post_id of the just-deleted row (which we can get from the row ID or by querying before deletion).
close_reason: Deferred: performance optimization. Table scan is O(mentions) which is small.
